items.title: Bill Gates pulls out of India's AI summit over Epstein files controversy
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Woman accused of using ChatGPT to plan drug murders
items.dek: The 21-year-old woman is accused by authorities in South Korea of secretly administering drinks containing drugs to three men in their 20s.
items.body: The 21-year-old woman is accused by authorities in South Korea of secretly administering drinks containing drugs to three men in their 20s.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Over 1,000 Kenyans enlisted to fight in Russia-Ukraine war, report says
items.dek: Investigators call the recruitment a well-organised trafficking ring involving immigration staff and security agencies.
items.body: Investigators call the recruitment a well-organised trafficking ring involving immigration staff and security agencies.
